title: tenants — cross-module relations
description: Cross-module Eloquent relations rooted at the two entities tenants still owns after the v0.3 platform split: Tenant + TenantContact. Application + BusinessType moved to `application/`; Domain + DomainRecord to `domains/`; Branding to `branding/`; TenantIntegration to `integrations/`; the Identity stub was deleted entirely (Identity belongs in identity-service, not platform-service). Each `target.module` is a bare basename (per the discovery contract); CI resolves it to the target module's schemas and validates the FK columns match. Cross-tenant FKs are FORBIDDEN — every FK is either same-tenant, application-scoped, or crosses no tenancy boundary at all.

relations.name: application
relations.description: Owned via BelongsToApplication trait (consumed from the `application` module).

relations.name: primaryBranding
relations.description: Nullable. Materialises the active Branding row and drives the denormalised `branding` JSONB on the tenants table.

cascade.description: Archiving a Tenant archives its Domains via the cascade FK on the domains table.

relations.name: organizations

cascade.description: Archiving a Tenant archives every Organization under it (soft-delete cascade).

relations.description: Every tenant carries at least one Organization (auto-provisioned with is_default=true). Multi-brand tenants add more.

relations.name: regions
relations.description: Every tenant provisions one default Region on create.

relations.name: branches
relations.description: Direct shortcut; also reachable via organizations.branches and regions.branches.

relations.name: users
relations.description: Every user belongs to exactly one tenant. A person invited to two tenants has one User row per tenant, all pointing at the same application-scoped Identity.

relations.name: roles
relations.description: Tenant-scoped roles on the sanctum guard. Platform roles (platform_admin guard) have tenant_id = null and are NOT part of this relation.

relations.name: subscription
relations.description: Exactly one subscription per (application_id, tenant_id) tuple.

relations.name: entitlementLicenses
relations.description: Full entitlement matrix for this tenant. quota_summary on /api/auth/me returns the top 3-5; the whole set is behind GET /api/v1/entitlements.

relations.name: audits
relations.description: Every mutation on any tenant-scoped model writes here. Depends on the Audit-adds-tenant_id migration (gap register).

morphs.name: scopeNode
morphs.description: Every Tenant projects into the scope substrate as a root node.

notes: Cross-tenant FKs are FORBIDDEN. Every FK on every relation above is same-tenant (BelongsToTenant), application-scoped (BelongsToApplication), or crosses no tenancy boundary at all (scopeNode morph).

Post-v0.3-split ownership: Application + BusinessType relations live in `modules/platform/application/relations.json`; Domain + DomainRecord in `modules/platform/domains/relations.json`; Branding in `modules/platform/branding/relations.json`; TenantIntegration in `modules/platform/integrations/relations.json`. Identity is NOT a platform module — it lives in identity-service (see `modules/identity/README.md`).

Cascade semantics: archiving a Tenant soft-deletes rows in the extracted modules (Domain / Branding / Integration) via the cascade FKs on those tables. Downstream domain modules (Organization, Branch, etc.) wire their own on-delete behaviour.
